name: @docmd/monorepo
description: The minimalist, zero-config documentation generator monorepo.

scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules packages/*/node_modules packages/plugins/*/node_modules packages/*/dist packages/plugins/*/dist packages/*/public packages/plugins/*/public packages/*/site packages/plugins/*/site *.tsbuildinfo temp-* >/dev/null 2>&1;
scripts.unlink: npm uninstall -g @docmd/core @docmd/monorepo docmd docmd-live -s >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; pnpm uninstall -g @docmd/core @docmd/monorepo docmd docmd-live -s >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; rm -f $(which -a docmd 2>/dev/null) $(which -a docmd-live 2>/dev/null) >/dev/null 2>&1 || true;
scripts.reset: node scripts/status.js start:reset && pnpm -s stop && pnpm -s unlink && pnpm -s clean && node scripts/status.js reset
